<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler; use Monolog\Level; use Psr\Log\LogLevel; use Monolog\Logger; use Monolog\LogRecord; /** * Blackhole * * Any record it can handle will be thrown away. This can be used * to put on top of an existing stack to override it temporarily. * * @author Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> */ class NullHandler extends Handler { private Level $level; /** * @param string|int|Level $level The minimum logging level at which this handler will be triggered * * @phpstan-param value-of<Level::VALUES>|value-of<Level::NAMES>|Level|LogLevel::* $level */ public function __construct(string|int|Level $level = Level::Debug) { $this->level = Logger::toMonologLevel($level); } /** * @inheritDoc */ public function isHandling(LogRecord $record): bool { return $record->level->value >= $this->level->value; } /** * @inheritDoc */ public function handle(LogRecord $record): bool { return $record->level->value >= $this->level->value; } }
